question: On June 1, will OpenAI be valued higher than Anthropic?
reason: Anthropic's valuation has recently surpassed OpenAI's, indicating a higher valuation on June 1, 2026.
evidence: Anthropic's valuation reached $1 trillion in April 2026, surpassing OpenAI's $880 billion valuation.
Anthropic is negotiating a new funding round that could value it at $900 billion, exceeding OpenAI's valuation.
In April 2026, Anthropic's annualized revenue was approximately $30 billion, compared to OpenAI's $25 billion.
Anthropic's workplace AI adoption surpassed OpenAI's in April 2026, with 34.4% adoption compared to OpenAI's 32.3%.
OpenAI's valuation was $852 billion in March 2026, while Anthropic's valuation was $380 billion in February 2026.
